query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "does vla even know the basics? measuring commonsense and world knowled" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (f) as a foundational survey and canonical reference for the "Vision-Language" domain (VLP) and "knowledge" aspects mentioned in the user's question about VLA (Vision-Language Action) models. While the user's question focuses on a specific evaluation of "commonsense and world knowledge" in VLA models, this paper provides the essential background on the pre-training mechanisms, knowledge integration, and state-of-the-art methods in the broader vision-language
